title: Rapidly Toasted Ukrainian Rye Bread
description: A quick and easy vegan-friendly dish featuring crispy Ukrainian rye bread and sweet jam, cooked to perfection in a tagine, perfect for a snack or light meal. This dish is a twist on traditional Ukrainian cuisine with a tagine-cooked twist.

ingredients.name: jam
ingredients.notes: any flavor, such as apricot or strawberry

instructions: Preheat the tagine or a large skillet over medium heat.
Slice the Ukrainian rye bread into 1-inch thick slices.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, salt, black pepper, and tagine spice blend.
Brush the mixture onto each slice of bread, making sure to coat evenly.
Place the bread slices in the preheated tagine or skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the bread is cooking, heat the jam in a small saucepan over low heat until warm and runny.
Once the bread is cooked, remove from the tagine or skillet and place on a serving plate.
Drizzle the warm jam over the toasted bread and sprinkle with a squeeze of lemon juice.
